title: oberonia rotunda
intro: Oberonia rotunda, also known as the Indian Oberonia, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Oberonia rotunda include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Oberonia rotunda is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
